name: ticktick
description: TickTick task, project, tag, habit and focus management (replaces Todoist)
install: export UV_PYTHON_INSTALL_DIR=/opt/uv-python && uv python install 3.12 && uv venv --python 3.12 .venv && VIRTUAL_ENV=.venv uv pip install --no-cache-dir mcp-ticktick==0.1.2 && chmod -R a+rX /opt/uv-python .venv
